class.name: EditorSpinSlider
class.brief_description: Godot editor's control for editing numeric values.
class.description: This [Control] node is used in the editor's Inspector dock to allow editing of numeric values. Can be used with [EditorInspectorPlugin] to recreate the same behavior. If the [member Range.step] value is [code]1[/code], the [EditorSpinSlider] will display up/down arrows, similar to [SpinBox]. If the [member Range.step] value is not [code]1[/code], a slider will be displayed instead.

members.member: The state in which the control used to manipulate the value will be.

If [code]true[/code], the [EditorSpinSlider] is considered to be editing an integer value. If [code]false[/code], the [EditorSpinSlider] is considered to be editing a floating-point value. This is used to determine whether a slider should be drawn by default. The slider is only drawn for floats; integers use up-down arrows similar to [SpinBox] instead, unless [member control_state] is set to [constant CONTROL_STATE_PREFER_SLIDER]. It will also use [member EditorSettings.interface/inspector/integer_drag_speed] instead of [member EditorSettings.interface/inspector/float_drag_speed] if the slider is available.
If [code]true[/code], the slider will not draw background.
If [code]true[/code], the slider and up/down arrows are hidden.
The text that displays to the left of the value.
If [code]true[/code], the slider can't be interacted with.
The suffix to display after the value (in a faded color). This should generally be a plural word. You may have to use an abbreviation if the suffix is too long to be displayed.

signal.name: grabbed
signal.description: Emitted when the spinner/slider is grabbed.

signal.name: ungrabbed
signal.description: Emitted when the spinner/slider is ungrabbed.

signal.name: updown_pressed
signal.description: Emitted when the updown button is pressed.

signal.name: value_focus_entered
signal.description: Emitted when the value form gains focus.

signal.name: value_focus_exited
signal.description: Emitted when the value form loses focus.

constants.constant: The type of control used will depend on the value of [member editing_integer]. Up-down arrows if [code]true[/code], a slider if [code]false[/code].
A slider will always be used, even if [member editing_integer] is enabled.
Neither the up-down arrows nor the slider will be shown.

theme_items.theme_item: The color of the text when the [EditorSpinSlider] is read-only.
The color of the label's text.
The color of the label's text when the [EditorSpinSlider] is read-only.
The vertical spacing between the up and down arrow icons.
The font used for the text.
The size of the font used for the text.
The icon used for the down arrow.
The icon used for the grabber.
The icon used for the grabber when the [EditorSpinSlider] is grabbed.
The icon used for the up arrow.
The style of the [EditorSpinSlider] when it is focused.
The style of the [EditorSpinSlider] when it is read-only.
The style of the up and down arrows when they are hovered.
The style of the up and down arrows when they are pressed.
